title: lithocardium silvestre
intro: Lithocardium silvestre, also known as Wild Horse's Teeth or Lithospermum, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the family Boraginaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antispasmodic and anti-inflammatory effects, which make it useful in treating conditions such as hypertension, cardiovascular diseases, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Lithocardium silvestre include reducing blood pressure, preventing the formation of blood clots, and protecting against oxidative stress. In herbal preparations, Lithocardium silvestre is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
